Bug 485748 - Progress bar stays even after completion

Call done() on the progress monitor after completion.

summary: Adding a try-finally block and a local variable is not supported by the DSL.

commitMessage:
Bug 485748 - Progress bar stays even after completion

Proactively call done() on the status bar progress monitor at the
highest level possible.

Change-Id: I3d872df18faf00493acf0708ef470c0467372e71
Signed-off-by: Stefan Xenos <sxenos@gmail.com>
summary: Cannot transform by wrapping code in a try-finally block and introducing a new variable with the current DSL.

commitMessage: Bug 400374: opening an editor when the maximum allowed is reached will result in an exception (and editor will not be opened)
summary: The DSL does not support commenting out existing statements or performing conditional removals based on runtime behavior.

commitMessage:
Fixed bug 487584: [api] clarify
ICompletionProposalExtension7#emphasizeMatch(..), avoid call to
getStyledDisplayString()

Change-Id: Ifd8e400b4d332c5547e9c2607a1993a117be0699
Signed-off-by: Noopur Gupta <noopur_gupta@in.ibm.com>
dslRule:
<!id: eclipse.api.emphasizeMatch.rename>
<!description: Renames the 'emphasizeMatch' method to 'getStyledDisplayString' in implementations of ICompletionProposalExtension7, following API clarification. This rule applies to method declarations that override the old method signature.>
<!severity: WARNING>
@java.lang.Override public org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StyledString emphasizeMatch(org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocument $document, int $offset, org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.BoldStylerProvider $boldStylerProvider)
=>
@java.lang.Override public org.eclipse.jface.viewers.StyledString getStyledDisplayString(org.eclipse.jface.text.IDocument $document, int $offset, org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.java.BoldStylerProvider $boldStylerProvider)
;;
summary: Rename `emphasizeMatch` method to `getStyledDisplayString`.

commitMessage:
Bug 480992 - [1.9] Versioning Changes support - JEP 223

Change-Id: I6e1822ac496e937c5e862bdfe066968234a10310
dslRule:
<!id: java.core.version.constant.update>
<!description: Update JavaCore.VERSION_1_9 constant to JavaCore.VERSION_9. The constant JavaCore.VERSION_1_9 was renamed/replaced with JavaCore.VERSION_9 for Java 9 module system support.>
<!severity: INFO>
org.eclipse.jdt.core.JavaCore.VERSION_1_9 :: sourceVersionGE(9)
=> org.eclipse.jdt.core.JavaCore.VERSION_9
;;
summary: Replaces the deprecated JavaCore.VERSION_1_9 constant with JavaCore.VERSION_9 when targeting Java 9 or later.
